heroTitle: Let's figure out exactly what needs to happen next.
heroDesc: 30 minutes. No pitch. No pressure. Just an honest look at where you are and what is getting in the way.
expectationsHeading: Here is what we will cover in 30 minutes.

expectations.title: Where you are right now
expectations.body: A quick look at your LinkedIn profile, your current content, and what is and is not working.

expectations.title: What is actually broken
expectations.body: I will tell you honestly what the real problem is. Not a vague answer. A specific diagnosis.

expectations.title: What to do next
expectations.body: Whether we work together or not, you will leave the call with a clear next step you can take immediately.

reassuranceHeading: This is not a sales call.
reassuranceBody: I do not use discovery calls as a pitch session. If what I offer is a good fit for where you are, I will let you know and tell you exactly how. If it is not the right time or the right fit, I will tell you that too and point you somewhere useful. The only goal of this call is to give you something valuable in 30 minutes.
calLabel: Pick a time that works for you.
calNote: You will get a confirmation email right away. If you need to reschedule, there is a link in that email.

faqs.q: Do I need to prepare anything before the call?
faqs.a: Just come as you are. If you want to share your LinkedIn profile link beforehand that is helpful but not required.

faqs.q: What if I am not ready to invest in anything right now?
faqs.a: That is completely fine. The call is still worth your time. You will leave with a clear picture of what needs fixing and you can decide what to do about it on your own timeline.

faqs.q: How quickly can we get started after the call?
faqs.a: For one-time projects I can usually start within a few days of the call. For monthly plans we agree on a start date that works for both of us.
